Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*****************************************************************

 Binary products of DCPOs

 The product of two DCPOs is again a DCPO, and this satisfies the
 usual universal property. In addition, we construct a basis for
 the product DCPO.

 Contents
 1. Upperbounds in the product
 2. The DCPO
 3. The first projection
 4. The second projection
 5. Pairing and products of functions
 6. Swap & associativity functions
 7. Lemmas on upperbounds in the product
 8. A basis for the product
 9. Products of Scott opens sets

 *****************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.Posets.Basics.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.Posets.PointedPosets.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.Posets.MonotoneFunctions.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.DCPOs.Core.DirectedSets.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.DCPOs.Core.Basics.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.DCPOs.Core.ScottContinuous.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.DCPOs.Core.ScottTopology.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.DCPOs.Core.WayBelow.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.DCPOs.Basis.Basis.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.DCPOs.Basis.Continuous.

New coercion path [element_of_strongly_maximal] : pr1hSet >-> pr1hSet is not definitionally an identity function.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]


Local Open Scope dcpo.

(** * 1. Upperbounds in the product *)

X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set
x: X
y: Y
Hx: is_least_upperbound DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)) x
Hy: is_least_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) y
is_least_upperbound (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D
  (x,, y)


X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set
x: X
y: Y
Hx: is_least_upperbound DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)) x
Hy: is_least_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) y
is_least_upperbound (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D
  (x,, y)

  
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set
x: X
y: Y
Hx: is_least_upperbound DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)) x
Hy: is_least_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) y
x':= x,, Hx : lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)): lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i))
is_least_upperbound (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D
  (x,, y)

Hy: is_least_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) y
x':= x,, Hx : lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)): lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i))
y':= y,, Hy : lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)): lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i))
is_least_upperbound (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D
  (x,, y)

I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set

y: Y

x':= x,, Hx : lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)): lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i))
y':= y,, Hy : lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)): lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i))

X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set
x: X
y: Y
Hx: is_least_upperbound DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)) x
Hy: is_least_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) y
x':= x,, Hx : lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)): lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i))
y':= y,, Hy : lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)): lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i))
∀ y0 : (X × Y)%set,
(is_upperbound (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D y0
 ⇒ prod_PartialOrder DX DY (x,, y) y0)%logic

DX: dcpo_struct X

I: UU

X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set
x: X
y: Y
Hx: is_least_upperbound DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)) x
Hy: is_least_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) y
x':= x,, Hx : lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)): lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i))
y':= y,, Hy : lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)): lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i))
i: I
prod_PartialOrder DX DY (D i) (x,, y)

    exact (lub_is_upperbound x' i ,, lub_is_upperbound y' i).
  
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set
x: X
y: Y
Hx: is_least_upperbound DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)) x
Hy: is_least_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) y
x':= x,, Hx : lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)): lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i))
y':= y,, Hy : lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)): lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i))
∀ y0 : (X × Y)%set,
(is_upperbound (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D y0
 ⇒ prod_PartialOrder DX DY (x,, y) y0)%logic
 
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set
x: X
y: Y
Hx: is_least_upperbound DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)) x
Hy: is_least_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) y
x':= x,, Hx : lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)): lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i))
y':= y,, Hy : lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)): lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i))
z: (X × Y)%set
Hz: is_upperbound (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D z
prod_PartialOrder DX DY (x,, y) z

    exact (lub_is_least x' _ (λ i, pr1 (Hz i))
           ,,
           lub_is_least y' _ (λ i, pr2 (Hz i))).
Qed.

(X × Y)%set
 exact (pr1 x ,, pr1 y).

y: lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i))
is_least_upperbound DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)) (pr1 x)
 exact (pr2 x).

DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set
x: lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i))
y: lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i))
is_least_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) (pr1 y)
 exact (pr2 y).
Defined.

(** * 2. The DCPO *)

DY: dcpo_struct Y
PartialOrder (X × Y)%set

DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
directed_complete_poset ?PX

DY: dcpo_struct Y
PartialOrder (X × Y)%set
 exact (prod_PartialOrder DX DY).

DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
directed_complete_poset (prod_PartialOrder DX DY)

DY: dcpo_struct Y

D: I → (X × Y)%set
HD: is_directed (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D
lub (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D

DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set
HD: is_directed (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D
lub DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i))
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set
HD: is_directed (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D
lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i))

DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU

X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set
HD: is_directed (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D
is_directed DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i))

      abstract
        (use (is_directed_comp _ _ HD) ;
         apply dirprod_pr1_is_monotone).
    
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set
HD: is_directed (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D
lub DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i))
 
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → (X × Y)%set
HD: is_directed (prod_PartialOrder DX DY) D
is_directed DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i))

      abstract
        (use (is_directed_comp _ _ HD) ;
         apply dirprod_pr2_is_monotone).
Defined.


X, Y: hSet
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
dcppo_struct (X × Y)%set


X, Y: hSet
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
dcppo_struct (X × Y)%set

  
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
bottom_element (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)

  exact (pr2 (prod_pointed_PartialOrder DX DY)).
Defined.

Definition prod_dcpo
           (X Y : dcpo)
  : dcpo
  := _ ,, prod_dcpo_struct X Y.

Definition prod_dcppo
           (X Y : dcppo)
  : dcppo
  := _ ,, prod_dcppo_struct X Y.

Notation "X × Y" := (prod_dcpo X Y) : dcpo.


X, Y: dcpo
xy₁, xy₂: X × Y
p: pr1 xy₁ ⊑ pr1 xy₂
q: pr2 xy₁ ⊑ pr2 xy₂
xy₁ ⊑ xy₂


X, Y: dcpo
xy₁, xy₂: X × Y
p: pr1 xy₁ ⊑ pr1 xy₂
q: pr2 xy₁ ⊑ pr2 xy₂
xy₁ ⊑ xy₂

  exact (p ,, q).
Qed.

(** * 3. The first projection *)

X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → X × Y
xy: (X × Y)%type
Hxy: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D xy
is_least_upperbound DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)) (pr1 xy)

∀ y : X,
(is_upperbound DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)) y
 ⇒ DX (pr1 xy) y)%logic

DX (pr1 (D i)) (pr1 xy)

    exact (pr1 (is_least_upperbound_is_upperbound Hxy i)).

X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → X × Y
xy: (X × Y)%type

x: X
Hx: is_upperbound DX (λ i : I, pr1 (D i)) x
i: I
DY (pr2 (D i)) (pr2 xy)
 exact (pr2 (is_least_upperbound_is_upperbound Hxy i)).
Qed.

DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
∀ (I : UU) (D : I → (X × Y)%set)
(_ : is_directed (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D)
(x : (X × Y)%set)
(_ : is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D x),
is_least_upperbound DX (λ i : I, dirprod_pr1 (D i))
  (dirprod_pr1 x)

X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
DI: I → (X × Y)%set
HD: is_directed (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) DI
x: (X × Y)%set
Hx: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) DI x
x': X
Hx': is_upperbound DX (λ i : I, dirprod_pr1 (DI i)) x'
is_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) DI (x',, pr2 x)

      
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
DI: I → (X × Y)%set
HD: is_directed (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) DI
x: (X × Y)%set
Hx: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) DI x
x': X
Hx': is_upperbound DX (λ i : I, dirprod_pr1 (DI i)) x'
i: I
prod_dcpo_struct DX DY (DI i) (x',, pr2 x)

      
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
DI: I → (X × Y)%set
HD: is_directed (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) DI
x: (X × Y)%set
Hx: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) DI x
x': X
Hx': is_upperbound DX (λ i : I, dirprod_pr1 (DI i)) x'
i: I
DX (pr1 (DI i)) x'
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
DI: I → (X × Y)%set
HD: is_directed (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) DI
x: (X × Y)%set
Hx: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) DI x
x': X
Hx': is_upperbound DX (λ i : I, dirprod_pr1 (DI i)) x'
i: I
DY (pr2 (DI i)) (pr2 x)

      
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
DI: I → (X × Y)%set
HD: is_directed (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) DI
x: (X × Y)%set
Hx: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) DI x
x': X
Hx': is_upperbound DX (λ i : I, dirprod_pr1 (DI i)) x'
i: I
DX (pr1 (DI i)) x'
 exact (Hx' i).
      
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
DI: I → (X × Y)%set
HD: is_directed (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) DI
x: (X × Y)%set
Hx: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) DI x
x': X
Hx': is_upperbound DX (λ i : I, dirprod_pr1 (DI i)) x'
i: I
DY (pr2 (DI i)) (pr2 x)
 exact (pr2 (is_least_upperbound_is_upperbound Hx i)).
Qed.


X, Y: hSet
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
is_strict_scott_continuous (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY)
  DX dirprod_pr1


X, Y: hSet
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
is_strict_scott_continuous (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY)
  DX dirprod_pr1

  
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
is_scott_continuous (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY) DX
  dirprod_pr1
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
dirprod_pr1
  (pointed_PartialOrder_to_point
     (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY)) =
pointed_PartialOrder_to_point DX

  
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
is_scott_continuous (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY) DX
  dirprod_pr1
 apply is_scott_continuous_dirprod_pr1.
  
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
dirprod_pr1
  (pointed_PartialOrder_to_point
     (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY)) =
pointed_PartialOrder_to_point DX
 apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition dirprod_pr1_scott_continuous_map
           (X Y : dcpo)
  : scott_continuous_map (X × Y) X
  := _ ,, is_scott_continuous_dirprod_pr1 X Y.

Notation "'π₁'" := (dirprod_pr1_scott_continuous_map _ _) : dcpo.

(** * 4. The second projection *)

X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → X × Y
xy: (X × Y)%type
Hxy: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D xy
is_least_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) (pr2 xy)


X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → X × Y
xy: (X × Y)%type
Hxy: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D xy
is_least_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) (pr2 xy)

  
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → X × Y
xy: (X × Y)%type
Hxy: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D xy
is_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) (pr2 xy)
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → X × Y
xy: (X × Y)%type
Hxy: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D xy
∀ y : Y,
(is_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) y
 ⇒ DY (pr2 xy) y)%logic

  
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → X × Y
xy: (X × Y)%type
Hxy: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D xy
is_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) (pr2 xy)
 
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → X × Y
xy: (X × Y)%type
Hxy: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D xy
i: I
DY (pr2 (D i)) (pr2 xy)

    exact (pr2 (is_least_upperbound_is_upperbound Hxy i)).
  
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → X × Y
xy: (X × Y)%type
Hxy: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D xy
∀ y : Y,
(is_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) y
 ⇒ DY (pr2 xy) y)%logic

y: Y
Hy: is_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) y
DY (pr2 xy) y

DY: dcpo_struct Y

y: Y

is_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D (pr1 xy,, y)

DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y

D: I → X × Y

y: Y

DX (pr1 (D i)) (pr1 xy)
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → X × Y
xy: (X × Y)%type

X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → X × Y
xy: (X × Y)%type

DX (pr1 (D i)) (pr1 xy)
 exact (pr1 (is_least_upperbound_is_upperbound Hxy i)).
    
X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
I: UU
D: I → X × Y
xy: (X × Y)%type
Hxy: is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D xy
y: Y
Hy: is_upperbound DY (λ i : I, pr2 (D i)) y
i: I
DY (pr2 (D i)) y
 exact (Hy i).
Qed.

X, Y: hSet
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
∀ (I : UU) (D : I → (X × Y)%set)
(_ : is_directed (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D)
(x : (X × Y)%set)
(_ : is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY) D x),
is_least_upperbound DY (λ i : I, dirprod_pr2 (D i))
  (dirprod_pr2 x)

  (dirprod_pr2 x)

  DY dirprod_pr2

  DY dirprod_pr2

  dirprod_pr2

DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
dirprod_pr2
  (pointed_PartialOrder_to_point
     (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY)) =

X, Y: hSet
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
is_scott_continuous (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY) DY
  dirprod_pr2
 apply is_scott_continuous_dirprod_pr2.

DY: dcppo_struct Y
dirprod_pr2
  (pointed_PartialOrder_to_point
     (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY)) =

 apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition dirprod_pr2_scott_continuous_map
           (X Y : dcpo)
  : scott_continuous_map (X × Y) Y
  := _ ,, is_scott_continuous_dirprod_pr2 X Y.

Notation "'π₂'" := (dirprod_pr2_scott_continuous_map _ _) : dcpo.

(** * 5. Pairing and (tensor) products of functions *)

W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
is_scott_continuous DW (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
  (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g))


W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
is_scott_continuous DW (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
  (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g))

  
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
is_monotone DW (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
  (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g))
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
∀ (I : UU) (D : I → W) (_ : is_directed DW D) (x : W)
(_ : is_least_upperbound DW D x),
is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
  (λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i))
  (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) x)

  
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
is_monotone DW (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
  (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g))
 
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
is_monotone DW DX f
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
is_monotone DW DY g

    
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
is_monotone DW DX f
 exact (is_scott_continuous_monotone Hf).
    
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
is_monotone DW DY g
 exact (is_scott_continuous_monotone Hg).
  
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
∀ (I : UU) (D : I → W) (_ : is_directed DW D) (x : W)
(_ : is_least_upperbound DW D x),
is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
  (λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i))
  (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) x)
 
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
I: UU
D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W
Hw: is_least_upperbound DW D w
is_least_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
  (λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i))
  (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) w)

    
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
I: UU
D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W
Hw: is_least_upperbound DW D w
is_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
  (λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i))
  (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) w)
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
I: UU
D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W
Hw: is_least_upperbound DW D w
∀ y : (X × Y)%set,
(is_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
   (λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i)) y
 ⇒ prod_dcpo_struct DX DY (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) w)
     y)%logic

    
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
I: UU
D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W
Hw: is_least_upperbound DW D w
is_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
  (λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i))
  (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) w)
 
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
I: UU
D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W
Hw: is_least_upperbound DW D w
i: I
prod_dcpo_struct DX DY (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i))
  (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) w)

      
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
I: UU
D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W
Hw: is_least_upperbound DW D w
i: I
DX (f (D i)) (f w)
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
I: UU
D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W
Hw: is_least_upperbound DW D w
i: I
DY (g (D i)) (g w)

      
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
I: UU
D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W
Hw: is_least_upperbound DW D w
i: I
DX (f (D i)) (f w)
 exact (is_least_upperbound_is_upperbound
                 (is_scott_continuous_lub Hf HD w Hw)
                 i).
      
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
I: UU
D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W
Hw: is_least_upperbound DW D w
i: I
DY (g (D i)) (g w)
 exact (is_least_upperbound_is_upperbound
                 (is_scott_continuous_lub Hg HD w Hw)
                 i).
    
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
I: UU
D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W
Hw: is_least_upperbound DW D w
∀ y : (X × Y)%set,
(is_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
   (λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i)) y
 ⇒ prod_dcpo_struct DX DY (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) w)
     y)%logic
 
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
I: UU
D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W
Hw: is_least_upperbound DW D w
xy: (X × Y)%set
Hxy: is_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
(λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i)) xy
prod_dcpo_struct DX DY (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) w) xy

      
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
I: UU
D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W
Hw: is_least_upperbound DW D w
xy: (X × Y)%set
Hxy: is_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
(λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i)) xy
DX (f w) (pr1 xy)
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y

D: I → W

w: W

xy: (X × Y)%set
Hxy: is_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
(λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i)) xy
DY (g w) (pr2 xy)

f: W → X

(λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i)) xy
DX (f w) (pr1 xy)

DW: dcpo_struct W

f: W → X

g: W → Y

w: W

(λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i)) xy
is_upperbound DX (λ i : I, f (D i)) (pr1 xy)

        
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_scott_continuous DW DY g
I: UU
D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W

Hxy: is_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
(λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i)) xy
i: I
DX (f (D i)) (pr1 xy)

        exact (pr1 (Hxy i)).

(λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i)) xy

W, X, Y: hSet

(λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i)) xy
is_upperbound DY (λ i : I, g (D i)) (pr2 xy)

        
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcpo_struct W
DX: dcpo_struct X
DY: dcpo_struct Y

g: W → Y

D: I → W
HD: is_directed DW D
w: W

Hxy: is_upperbound (prod_dcpo_struct DX DY)
(λ i : I, prodtofuntoprod (f,, g) (D i)) xy
i: I
DY (g (D i)) (pr2 xy)

        exact (pr2 (Hxy i)).

W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcppo_struct W
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DY g
is_strict_scott_continuous DW
  (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY) (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g))


W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcppo_struct W
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DY g
is_strict_scott_continuous DW
  (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY) (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g))

  
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcppo_struct W
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DY g
is_scott_continuous DW (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY)
  (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g))
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcppo_struct W
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DY g
prodtofuntoprod (f,, g)
  (pointed_PartialOrder_to_point DW) =
pointed_PartialOrder_to_point
  (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY)

  
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcppo_struct W
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DY g
is_scott_continuous DW (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY)
  (prodtofuntoprod (f,, g))
 exact (is_scott_continuous_prodtofun Hf Hg).
  
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcppo_struct W
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DY g
prodtofuntoprod (f,, g)
  (pointed_PartialOrder_to_point DW) =
pointed_PartialOrder_to_point
  (prod_dcppo_struct DX DY)
 
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcppo_struct W
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DY g
pr1 (f,, g) (pointed_PartialOrder_to_point DW) =
pointed_PartialOrder_to_point DX
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcppo_struct W
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DY g
pr2 (f,, g) (pointed_PartialOrder_to_point DW) =
pointed_PartialOrder_to_point DY

    
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcppo_struct W
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DY g
pr1 (f,, g) (pointed_PartialOrder_to_point DW) =
pointed_PartialOrder_to_point DX
 apply Hf.
    
W, X, Y: hSet
DW: dcppo_struct W
DX: dcppo_struct X
DY: dcppo_struct Y
f: W → X
Hf: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DX f
g: W → Y
Hg: is_strict_scott_continuous DW DY g
pr2 (f,, g) (pointed_PartialOrder_to_point DW) =
pointed_PartialOrder_to_point DY
 apply Hg.
Qed.

Definition pair_scott_continuous
           {W X Y : dcpo}
           (f : scott_continuous_map W X)
           (g : scott_continuous_map W Y)
  : scott_continuous_map W (X × Y)
  := _ ,, is_scott_continuous_prodtofun (pr2 f) (pr2 g).

Notation "⟨ f , g ⟩" := (pair_scott_continuous f g) : dcpo.

Definition tensor_scott_continuous_map
           {X₁ X₂ Y₁ Y₂ : dcpo}
           (f₁ : scott_continuous_map X₁ Y₁)
           (f₂ : scott_continuous_map X₂ Y₂)
  : scott_continuous_map (X₁ × X₂) (Y₁ × Y₂)
  := ⟨ π₁ · f₁ , π₂ · f₂ ⟩.

Notation "f₁ ⊗ f₂" := (tensor_scott_continuous_map f₁ f₂) : dcpo.

(** * 6. Swap & associativity functions *)
Definition dcpo_swap
           (A B : dcpo)
  : scott_continuous_map (A × B) (B × A)
  := ⟨ dirprod_pr2_scott_continuous_map _ _
     , dirprod_pr1_scott_continuous_map _ _ ⟩.

Definition assoc_scott_continuous_map
           (X Y Z : dcpo)
  : scott_continuous_map (X × Y × Z) ((X × Y) × Z)
  := ⟨ ⟨ π₁ , π₂ · π₁ ⟩ , π₂ · π₂ ⟩.

Notation "'α'" := (assoc_scott_continuous_map _ _ _) : dcpo.

(** * 7. Lemmas on upperbounds in the product *)

X, Y: dcpo
D: directed_set (X × Y)
⨆ D = ⨆_{ D} π₁,, ⨆_{ D} π₂


X, Y: dcpo
D: directed_set (X × Y)
⨆ D = ⨆_{ D} π₁,, ⨆_{ D} π₂

  
X, Y: dcpo
D: directed_set (X × Y)
is_least_upperbound (X × Y) D (⨆ D)
X, Y: dcpo
D: directed_set (X × Y)
is_least_upperbound (X × Y) D (⨆_{ D} π₁,, ⨆_{ D} π₂)

  
X, Y: dcpo
D: directed_set (X × Y)
is_least_upperbound (X × Y) D (⨆ D)
 apply is_least_upperbound_dcpo_lub.
  
X, Y: dcpo
D: directed_set (X × Y)
is_least_upperbound (X × Y) D (⨆_{ D} π₁,, ⨆_{ D} π₂)
 
X, Y: dcpo
D: directed_set (X × Y)
is_least_upperbound (pr2 X) (λ i : D, pr1 (D i))
  (⨆_{ D} π₁)
X, Y: dcpo
D: directed_set (X × Y)
is_least_upperbound (pr2 Y) (λ i : D, pr2 (D i))
  (⨆_{ D} π₂)

    
X, Y: dcpo
D: directed_set (X × Y)
is_least_upperbound (pr2 X) (λ i : D, pr1 (D i))
  (⨆_{ D} π₁)
 exact (is_least_upperbound_dcpo_comp_lub
               (dirprod_pr1_scott_continuous_map X Y)
               D).
    
X, Y: dcpo
D: directed_set (X × Y)
is_least_upperbound (pr2 Y) (λ i : D, pr2 (D i))
  (⨆_{ D} π₂)
 exact (is_least_upperbound_dcpo_comp_lub
               (dirprod_pr2_scott_continuous_map X Y)
               D).
Qed.

Definition prod_directed_set_dcpo
           {X Y : dcpo}
           (D₁ : directed_set X)
           (D₂ : directed_set Y)
  : directed_set (X × Y)
  := prod_directed_set D₁ D₂.


X, Y: dcpo
D: directed_set X
D': directed_set Y
⨆ prod_directed_set_dcpo D D' = ⨆ D,, ⨆ D'


X, Y: dcpo

D': directed_set Y
⨆ prod_directed_set_dcpo D D' = ⨆ D,, ⨆ D'

D': directed_set Y
⨆ prod_directed_set_dcpo D D' ⊑ ⨆ D,, ⨆ D'

⨆ D,, ⨆ D' ⊑ ⨆ prod_directed_set_dcpo D D'

∏ i : prod_directed_set_dcpo D D',

D' (pr2 i) ⊑ ⨆ D'

D Di ⊑ D Di

D Di ⊑ D Di
 apply refl_dcpo.
      
X, Y: dcpo
D: directed_set X
D': directed_set Y
Di: D
Di', i': D'
D' i' ⊑ D' i'
 apply refl_dcpo.
Qed.

(** * 8. A basis for the product *)
Section ProductBasis.
  Context {X Y : dcpo}
          (BX : dcpo_basis X)
          (BY : dcpo_basis Y).

  
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy₁, xy₂: X × Y
p: xy₁ ≪ xy₂
pr1 xy₁ ≪ pr1 xy₂

  
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy₁, xy₂: X × Y
p: xy₁ ≪ xy₂
pr1 xy₁ ≪ pr1 xy₂

BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy₁, xy₂: X × Y
p: xy₁ ≪ xy₂
D: directed_set X
q: pr1 xy₂ ⊑ ⨆ D
∃ i : D, pr1 xy₁ ⊑ D i

BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy₁, xy₂: X × Y
p: xy₁ ≪ xy₂
D: directed_set X
q: pr1 xy₂ ⊑ ⨆ D
D':= prod_directed_set_dcpo D
  (directed_set_from_basis BY (pr2 xy₂)): directed_set (X × Y)
∃ i : D, pr1 xy₁ ⊑ D i

BY: dcpo_basis Y

BY: dcpo_basis Y

p: xy₁ ≪ xy₂

D':= prod_directed_set_dcpo D

X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy₁, xy₂: X × Y
p: xy₁ ≪ xy₂
D: directed_set X
q: pr1 xy₂ ⊑ ⨆ D
D':= prod_directed_set_dcpo D
  (directed_set_from_basis BY (pr2 xy₂)): directed_set (X × Y)

X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy₁, xy₂: X × Y
p: xy₁ ≪ xy₂
D: directed_set X
q: pr1 xy₂ ⊑ ⨆ D
D':= prod_directed_set_dcpo D
  (directed_set_from_basis BY (pr2 xy₂)): directed_set (X × Y)

X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy₁, xy₂: X × Y
p: xy₁ ≪ xy₂
D: directed_set X
q: pr1 xy₂ ⊑ ⨆ D
D':= prod_directed_set_dcpo D
  (directed_set_from_basis BY (pr2 xy₂)): directed_set (X × Y)
HD: xy₂ ⊑ ⨆ D'
i: D'
H: xy₁ ⊑ D' i
∃ i : D, pr1 xy₁ ⊑ D i

    exact (hinhpr (pr1 i ,, pr1 H)).
  Qed.

i: π₁ {{D}}
s₁: pr1 xy₁ ⊑ (π₁ {{D}}) i
(∑ i : π₂ {{D}}, pr2 xy₁ ⊑ (π₂ {{D}}) i)
→ ∃ i : D, xy₁ ⊑ D i

BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y

q: pr2 xy₁ ≪ pr2 xy₂
D: directed_set (X × Y)
r: xy₂ ⊑ ⨆_{ D} π₁,, ⨆_{ D} π₂
i: π₁ {{D}}
s₁: pr1 xy₁ ⊑ (π₁ {{D}}) i
isaprop (∃ i : D, xy₁ ⊑ D i)

      apply propproperty.

BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy₁, xy₂: X × Y
p: pr1 xy₁ ≪ pr1 xy₂
q: pr2 xy₁ ≪ pr2 xy₂

j: π₂ {{D}}
s₂: pr2 xy₁ ⊑ (π₂ {{D}}) j
t: D
u₁: (X × Y) (D i) (D t)
u₂: (X × Y) (D j) (D t)
pr2 X (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 (D t))
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy₁, xy₂: X × Y
p: pr1 xy₁ ≪ pr1 xy₂
q: pr2 xy₁ ≪ pr2 xy₂
D: directed_set (X × Y)
r: xy₂ ⊑ ⨆_{ D} π₁,, ⨆_{ D} π₂
i: π₁ {{D}}
s₁: pr1 xy₁ ⊑ (π₁ {{D}}) i
j: π₂ {{D}}
s₂: pr2 xy₁ ⊑ (π₂ {{D}}) j
t: D
u₁: (X × Y) (D i) (D t)
u₂: (X × Y) (D j) (D t)
(λ _ : pr2 X (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 (D t)),
 pr2 Y (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 (D t))) ?pr1

    
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy₁, xy₂: X × Y
p: pr1 xy₁ ≪ pr1 xy₂
q: pr2 xy₁ ≪ pr2 xy₂
D: directed_set (X × Y)
r: xy₂ ⊑ ⨆_{ D} π₁,, ⨆_{ D} π₂
i: π₁ {{D}}
s₁: pr1 xy₁ ⊑ (π₁ {{D}}) i
j: π₂ {{D}}
s₂: pr2 xy₁ ⊑ (π₂ {{D}}) j
t: D
u₁: (X × Y) (D i) (D t)
u₂: (X × Y) (D j) (D t)
pr2 X (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 (D t))
 exact (trans_dcpo s₁ (pr1 u₁)).
    
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy₁, xy₂: X × Y
p: pr1 xy₁ ≪ pr1 xy₂
q: pr2 xy₁ ≪ pr2 xy₂
D: directed_set (X × Y)
r: xy₂ ⊑ ⨆_{ D} π₁,, ⨆_{ D} π₂
i: π₁ {{D}}
s₁: pr1 xy₁ ⊑ (π₁ {{D}}) i
j: π₂ {{D}}
s₂: pr2 xy₁ ⊑ (π₂ {{D}}) j
t: D
u₁: (X × Y) (D i) (D t)
u₂: (X × Y) (D j) (D t)
(λ _ : pr2 X (pr1 xy₁) (pr1 (D t)),
 pr2 Y (pr2 xy₁) (pr2 (D t))) (trans_dcpo s₁ (pr1 u₁))
 exact (trans_dcpo s₂ (pr2 u₂)).
  Qed.

xy₁ ≪ xy₂

     (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy j)
     (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy k))%type

q₁: Y
  (directed_set_from_basis BY (pr2 xy)
     (pr21 ij₁,, way_below_prod_pr2 (pr2 ij₁)))
  (directed_set_from_basis BY (pr2 xy) l)
q₂: Y
  (directed_set_from_basis BY (pr2 xy)
     (pr21 ij₂,, way_below_prod_pr2 (pr2 ij₂)))
  (directed_set_from_basis BY (pr2 xy) l)
pr2 X
  (pr1 (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy ij₁))
  (pr1
     (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy
        ((?pr1,, ?pr2),, ?pr20)))

         ((?pr1,, ?pr2),, ?pr20)))) ?pr10

         to_way_below_prod (pr2 k) (pr2 l))))

X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy: X × Y
is_least_upperbound (X × Y)
  (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy) xy
 
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy: X × Y
is_least_upperbound (pr2 X)
  (λ i : basis_below_element prod_dcpo_basis_data xy,
   pr1 (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy i))
  (pr1 xy)
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy: X × Y
is_least_upperbound (pr2 Y)
  (λ i : basis_below_element prod_dcpo_basis_data xy,
   pr2 (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy i))
  (pr2 xy)

      
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy: X × Y
is_least_upperbound (pr2 X)
  (λ i : basis_below_element prod_dcpo_basis_data xy,
   pr1 (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy i))
  (pr1 xy)
 
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy: X × Y
is_upperbound (pr2 X)
  (λ i : basis_below_element prod_dcpo_basis_data xy,
   pr1 (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy i))
  (pr1 xy)
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy: X × Y
∀ y : pr1 X,
(is_upperbound (pr2 X)
   (λ i : basis_below_element prod_dcpo_basis_data xy,
    pr1 (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy i)) y
 ⇒ pr2 X (pr1 xy) y)%logic

        
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy: X × Y
is_upperbound (pr2 X)
  (λ i : basis_below_element prod_dcpo_basis_data xy,
   pr1 (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy i))
  (pr1 xy)
 
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy: X × Y
a: basis_below_element prod_dcpo_basis_data xy
pr2 X
  (pr1 (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy a))
  (pr1 xy)

          
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy: X × Y
a: basis_below_element prod_dcpo_basis_data xy
BX (pr11 a) ≪ pr1 xy

          apply (way_below_prod_pr1 (pr2 a)).
        
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy: X × Y
∀ y : pr1 X,
(is_upperbound (pr2 X)
   (λ i : basis_below_element prod_dcpo_basis_data xy,
    pr1 (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy i)) y
 ⇒ pr2 X (pr1 xy) y)%logic
 
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy: X × Y
a: pr1 X
Ha: is_upperbound (pr2 X)
  (λ i : basis_below_element prod_dcpo_basis_data
           xy,
   pr1
     (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy i))
  a
pr2 X (pr1 xy) a

          
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy: X × Y
a: pr1 X
Ha: is_upperbound (pr2 X)
  (λ i : basis_below_element prod_dcpo_basis_data
           xy,
   pr1
     (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy i))
  a
is_upperbound X (basis_below_map BX (pr1 xy)) a

          
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
xy: X × Y
a: pr1 X
Ha: is_upperbound (pr2 X)
  (λ i : basis_below_element prod_dcpo_basis_data
           xy,
   pr1
     (basis_below_map prod_dcpo_basis_data xy i))
  a
b: basis_below_element BX (pr1 xy)
X (basis_below_map BX (pr1 xy) b) a

X, Y: dcpo

 exact (pr2 b).
  Qed.

  
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
dcpo_basis (X × Y)

  
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y

BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y

X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
dcpo_basis_laws (X × Y) ?B

    
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
dcpo_basis_data (X × Y)
 exact prod_dcpo_basis_data.
    
X, Y: dcpo
BX: dcpo_basis X
BY: dcpo_basis Y
dcpo_basis_laws (X × Y) prod_dcpo_basis_data
 exact prod_dcpo_basis_laws.
  Defined.
End ProductBasis.


X, Y: dcpo

CY: continuous_dcpo_struct Y
continuous_dcpo_struct (X × Y)

CY: continuous_dcpo_struct Y
dcpo_basis X
 
X, Y: dcpo
CX: continuous_dcpo_struct X
CY: continuous_dcpo_struct Y
continuous_dcpo_struct X

    exact CX.
  
X, Y: dcpo
CX: continuous_dcpo_struct X
CY: continuous_dcpo_struct Y
dcpo_basis Y
 
X, Y: dcpo
CX: continuous_dcpo_struct X
CY: continuous_dcpo_struct Y
continuous_dcpo_struct Y

    exact CY.
Defined.

(** * 9. Products of Scott-open sets

The Scott-open sets in the binary product are the products of Scott-open sets.
 *)
Section scott_open_binprod.
  Context {A B : dcpo}.

  
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
is_scott_open (λ a : A, P (a,, b))

  
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
is_scott_open (λ a : A, P (a,, b))

    
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
is_upper_set (λ a : A, P (a,, b))
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
is_lub_inaccessible (λ a : A, P (a,, b))

    
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
is_upper_set (λ a : A, P (a,, b))
 
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
a₁, a₂: A
p₁: P (a₁,, b)
p₂: a₁ ⊑ a₂
P (a₂,, b)

      
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
a₁, a₂: A
p₁: P (a₁,, b)
p₂: a₁ ⊑ a₂
a₁,, b ⊑ a₂,, b

      
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
a₁, a₂: A
p₁: P (a₁,, b)
p₂: a₁ ⊑ a₂
pr2 A (pr1 (a₁,, b)) (pr1 (a₂,, b))
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
a₁, a₂: A
p₁: P (a₁,, b)
p₂: a₁ ⊑ a₂
pr2 B (pr2 (a₁,, b)) (pr2 (a₂,, b))

      
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
a₁, a₂: A
p₁: P (a₁,, b)
p₂: a₁ ⊑ a₂
pr2 A (pr1 (a₁,, b)) (pr1 (a₂,, b))
 exact p₂.
      
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
a₁, a₂: A
p₁: P (a₁,, b)
p₂: a₁ ⊑ a₂
pr2 B (pr2 (a₁,, b)) (pr2 (a₂,, b))
 apply refl_dcpo.
    
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
is_lub_inaccessible (λ a : A, P (a,, b))
 
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
D: directed_set A
Dp: P (⨆ D,, b)
∃ i : D, P (D i,, b)

      
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
D: directed_set A
Dp: P (⨆ D,, b)
p:= is_scott_open_lub_inaccessible P
  (prod_directed_set_dcpo D
     (const_directed_set B b D (directed_set_el D))): P
  (⨆ prod_directed_set_dcpo D
       (const_directed_set B b D
          (directed_set_el D)))
→ ∃ i : prod_directed_set_dcpo D
          (const_directed_set B b D
             (directed_set_el D)),
  P
    (prod_directed_set_dcpo D
       (const_directed_set B b D
          (directed_set_el D)) i)
∃ i : D, P (D i,, b)

      
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
D: directed_set A
Dp: P (⨆ D,, b)
p: P
  (⨆ D,,
   ⨆ const_directed_set B b D (directed_set_el D))
→ ∃ i : prod_directed_set_dcpo D
          (const_directed_set B b D
             (directed_set_el D)),
  P
    (prod_directed_set_dcpo D
       (const_directed_set B b D
          (directed_set_el D)) i)
∃ i : D, P (D i,, b)

      
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
D: directed_set A
Dp: P (⨆ D,, b)
p: P (⨆ D,, b)
→ ∃ i : prod_directed_set_dcpo D
          (const_directed_set B b D
             (directed_set_el D)),
  P
    (prod_directed_set_dcpo D
       (const_directed_set B b D
          (directed_set_el D)) i)
∃ i : D, P (D i,, b)

      
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
D: directed_set A
Dp: P (⨆ D,, b)
p: P (⨆ D,, b)
→ ∃ i : prod_directed_set_dcpo D
          (const_directed_set B b D
             (directed_set_el D)),
  P
    (prod_directed_set_dcpo D
       (const_directed_set B b D
          (directed_set_el D)) i)
H: ∃ i : prod_directed_set_dcpo D
        (const_directed_set B b D
           (directed_set_el D)),
P
  (prod_directed_set_dcpo D
     (const_directed_set B b D (directed_set_el D))
     i)
∃ i : D, P (D i,, b)

      
A, B: dcpo
P: scott_open_set (A × B)
b: B
D: directed_set A
Dp: P (⨆ D,, b)
p: P (⨆ D,, b)
→ ∃ i : prod_directed_set_dcpo D
          (const_directed_set B b D
             (directed_set_el D)),
  P
    (prod_directed_set_dcpo D
       (const_directed_set B b D
          (directed_set_el D)) i)
(∃ i : prod_directed_set_dcpo D
         (const_directed_set B b D (directed_set_el D)),
 P

→ ∃ i : D, P (D i,, b)

PA: scott_open_set A
PB: scott_open_set B
(λ P : (A × B)%dcpo → hProp, is_scott_open P) ?pr1

    
A, B: dcpo
PA: scott_open_set A
PB: scott_open_set B
(A × B)%dcpo → hProp
 exact (λ x, PA (pr1 x) ∧ PB (pr2 x)).
    
A, B: dcpo
PA: scott_open_set A
PB: scott_open_set B
(λ P : (A × B)%dcpo → hProp, is_scott_open P)
  (λ x : (A × B)%dcpo, PA (pr1 x) ∧ PB (pr2 x))
 exact (prod_is_scott_open PA PB).
  Defined.

End scott_open_binprod.

(** * 10. Strongly maximal elements in products

     Applies to continuous DCPOs
 *)
Section StronglyMaximal.
  Context {A B : dcpo}
          (CA : continuous_dcpo_struct A)
          (CB : continuous_dcpo_struct B).

  Let basis_A : dcpo_basis A := basis_from_continuous_struct CA.
  Let basis_B : dcpo_basis B := basis_from_continuous_struct CB.

  
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
is_strongly_maximal a

  
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
is_strongly_maximal a

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
H: ∃ y : B, y ≪ b
is_strongly_maximal a

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
(∃ y : B, y ≪ b) → is_strongly_maximal a

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
(∑ y : B, y ≪ b) → is_strongly_maximal a

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
bl: B
p: bl ≪ b
is_strongly_maximal a

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
bl: B
p: bl ≪ b
x, y: A
q: x ≪ y
x ≪ a ∨ is_hausdorff_separated y a

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
bl: B
p: bl ≪ b
x, y: A
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod q p: x,, bl ≪ y,, b
x ≪ a ∨ is_hausdorff_separated y a

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
bl: B
p: bl ≪ b
x, y: A
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod q p: x,, bl ≪ y,, b
H: x,, bl ≪ a,, b
∨ is_hausdorff_separated (y,, b) (a,, b)
x ≪ a ∨ is_hausdorff_separated y a

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
bl: B
p: bl ≪ b
x, y: A
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod q p: x,, bl ≪ y,, b
x,, bl ≪ a,, b
∨ is_hausdorff_separated (y,, b) (a,, b)
→ x ≪ a ∨ is_hausdorff_separated y a

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
bl: B
p: bl ≪ b
x, y: A
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod q p: x,, bl ≪ y,, b
(x,, bl ≪ a,, b)
⨿ is_hausdorff_separated (y,, b) (a,, b)
→ x ≪ a ∨ is_hausdorff_separated y a

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B

q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod q p: x,, bl ≪ y,, b
H: x,, bl ≪ a,, b
x ≪ a ∨ is_hausdorff_separated y a

CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B

A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
bl: B
p: bl ≪ b
x, y: A
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod q p: x,, bl ≪ y,, b
H: x,, bl ≪ a,, b
x ≪ a

      exact (way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B H).
    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B

qp:= to_way_below_prod q p: x,, bl ≪ y,, b

q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod q p: x,, bl ≪ y,, b
H: is_hausdorff_separated (y,, b) (a,, b)

A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B

b: B

bl: B
p: bl ≪ b
x, y: A
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod q p: x,, bl ≪ y,, b
is_hausdorff_separated (y,, b) (a,, b)
→ is_hausdorff_separated y a

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
bl: B
p: bl ≪ b
x, y: A
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod q p: x,, bl ≪ y,, b
(∑ P₁ P₂ : scott_open_set (A × B),
 P₁ (y,, b) ∧ P₂ (a,, b) ∧ are_disjoint P₁ P₂)
→ is_hausdorff_separated y a

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B

b: B

bl: B
p: bl ≪ b
x, y: A
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod q p: x,, bl ≪ y,, b
P₁, P₂: scott_open_set (A × B)
H₁: P₁ (y,, b)
H₂: P₂ (a,, b)
H₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
is_hausdorff_separated y a

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B

x, y: A
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod q p: x,, bl ≪ y,, b
P₁, P₂: scott_open_set (A × B)
H₁: P₁ (y,, b)
H₂: P₂ (a,, b)
H₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
∑ P₁ P₂ : scott_open_set A,
P₁ y ∧ P₂ a ∧ are_disjoint P₁ P₂

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B

H₂: P₂ (a,, b)
H₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
P₁ (y,, b)

CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B

H₂: P₂ (a,, b)
H₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
∏ x : A, ¬ (P₁ (x,, b) × P₂ (x,, b))%type

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B

H₁: P₁ (y,, b)
H₂: P₂ (a,, b)
H₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
P₁ (y,, b)
 exact H₁.
      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A

 exact H₂.

H₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
∏ x : A, ¬ (P₁ (x,, b) × P₂ (x,, b))%type
 
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B

H₂: P₂ (a,, b)
H₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
z: A
n: (P₁ (z,, b) × P₂ (z,, b))%type
∅

        
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
bl: B
p: bl ≪ b
x, y: A
q: x ≪ y

P₁, P₂: scott_open_set (A × B)
H₁: P₁ (y,, b)
H₂: P₂ (a,, b)
H₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
z: A
n: (P₁ (z,, b) × P₂ (z,, b))%type
P₁ (z,, b) ∧ P₂ (z,, b)

        exact n.
  Qed.

CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B

is_strongly_maximal b

A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
al: A
p: al ≪ a
x, y: B
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod p q: al,, x ≪ a,, y
H: is_hausdorff_separated (a,, y) (a,, b)
x ≪ b ∨ is_hausdorff_separated y b

al: A
p: al ≪ a
x, y: B
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod p q: al,, x ≪ a,, y
H: is_hausdorff_separated (a,, y) (a,, b)
is_hausdorff_separated y b

CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B

al: A
p: al ≪ a
x, y: B
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod p q: al,, x ≪ a,, y
is_hausdorff_separated (a,, y) (a,, b)
→ is_hausdorff_separated y b

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
al: A
p: al ≪ a
x, y: B
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod p q: al,, x ≪ a,, y
(∑ P₁ P₂ : scott_open_set (A × B),
 P₁ (a,, y) ∧ P₂ (a,, b) ∧ are_disjoint P₁ P₂)
→ is_hausdorff_separated y b

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
al: A
p: al ≪ a
x, y: B
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod p q: al,, x ≪ a,, y
P₁, P₂: scott_open_set (A × B)
H₁: P₁ (a,, y)
H₂: P₂ (a,, b)
H₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
is_hausdorff_separated y b

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B

al: A
p: al ≪ a
x, y: B
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod p q: al,, x ≪ a,, y
P₁, P₂: scott_open_set (A × B)
H₁: P₁ (a,, y)
H₂: P₂ (a,, b)
H₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
∑ P₁ P₂ : scott_open_set B,
P₁ y ∧ P₂ b ∧ are_disjoint P₁ P₂

x, y: B
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod p q: al,, x ≪ a,, y
P₁, P₂: scott_open_set (A × B)
H₁: P₁ (a,, y)
H₂: P₂ (a,, b)
H₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
P₁ (a,, y)
 exact H₁.

A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Hab: is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
al: A
p: al ≪ a
x, y: B
q: x ≪ y
qp:= to_way_below_prod p q: al,, x ≪ a,, y
P₁, P₂: scott_open_set (A × B)
H₁: P₁ (a,, y)
H₂: P₂ (a,, b)
H₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
z: B
n: (P₁ (a,, z) × P₂ (a,, z))%type
P₁ (a,, z) ∧ P₂ (a,, z)

        exact n.
  Qed.

Hb: is_strongly_maximal b

CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
x₁,, y₁ ≪ a,, b
∨ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
x₁,, y₁ ≪ a,, b
∨ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
x₁,, y₁ ≪ a,, b
∨ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B

b: B

Hb: is_strongly_maximal b

y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H: x₁ ≪ a ∨ is_hausdorff_separated x₂ a
x₁,, y₁ ≪ a,, b
∨ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
x₁ ≪ a ∨ is_hausdorff_separated x₂ a
→ x₁,, y₁ ≪ a,, b
  ∨ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
(x₁ ≪ a) ⨿ is_hausdorff_separated x₂ a
→ x₁,, y₁ ≪ a,, b
  ∨ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₁: (x₁ ≪ a) ⨿ is_hausdorff_separated x₂ a
H: y₁ ≪ b ∨ is_hausdorff_separated y₂ b

∨ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₁: (x₁ ≪ a) ⨿ is_hausdorff_separated x₂ a
y₁ ≪ b ∨ is_hausdorff_separated y₂ b
→ x₁,, y₁ ≪ a,, b
  ∨ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₁: (x₁ ≪ a) ⨿ is_hausdorff_separated x₂ a
(y₁ ≪ b) ⨿ is_hausdorff_separated y₂ b
→ x₁,, y₁ ≪ a,, b
  ∨ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B

basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B

Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₁: (x₁ ≪ a) ⨿ is_hausdorff_separated x₂ a
H₂: (y₁ ≪ b) ⨿ is_hausdorff_separated y₂ b
x₁,, y₁ ≪ a,, b
∨ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₁: x₁ ≪ a
H₂: y₁ ≪ b
x₁,, y₁ ≪ a,, b

b: B

Hb: is_strongly_maximal b

y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂

is_hausdorff_separated y₂ b
→ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₁: x₁ ≪ a
(∑ P₁ P₂ : scott_open_set B,
 P₁ y₂ ∧ P₂ b ∧ are_disjoint P₁ P₂)
→ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₁: x₁ ≪ a
P₁, P₂: scott_open_set B
r₁: P₁ y₂
r₂: P₂ b
r₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₁: x₁ ≪ a
P₁, P₂: scott_open_set B
r₁: P₁ y₂
r₂: P₂ b
r₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
∑ P₁ P₂ : scott_open_set (A × B),
P₁ (x₂,, y₂) ∧ P₂ (a,, b) ∧ are_disjoint P₁ P₂

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₁: x₁ ≪ a
P₁, P₂: scott_open_set B
r₁: P₁ y₂
r₂: P₂ b
r₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
∑ P₂ : scott_open_set (A × B),
prod_scott_open (true_scott_open_set A) P₁ (x₂,, y₂)
∧ P₂ (a,, b)
  ∧ are_disjoint
      (prod_scott_open (true_scott_open_set A) P₁) P₂

b: B

x₂: pr1 A

p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₁: x₁ ≪ a
P₁, P₂: scott_open_set B
r₁: P₁ y₂
r₂: P₂ b
r₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
(unit × P₁ y₂)%type

CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B

basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B

r₂: P₂ b
r₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
∏ x : pr1 A × pr1 B,
¬ ((unit × P₁ (pr2 x)) × unit × P₂ (pr2 x))%type

basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A

Hb: is_strongly_maximal b

y₂: pr1 B

p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂

H₂: y₁ ≪ b
x₁,, y₁ ≪ a,, b
∨ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

→ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₂: y₁ ≪ b
(∑ P₁ P₂ : scott_open_set A,
 P₁ x₂ ∧ P₂ a ∧ are_disjoint P₁ P₂)
→ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

r₂: P₂ a

a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₂: y₁ ≪ b
P₁, P₂: scott_open_set A
r₁: P₁ x₂
r₂: P₂ a
r₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
∑ P₂ : scott_open_set (A × B),
prod_scott_open P₁ (true_scott_open_set B) (x₂,, y₂)
∧ P₂ (a,, b)
  ∧ are_disjoint
      (prod_scott_open P₁ (true_scott_open_set B)) P₂

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₂: y₁ ≪ b
P₁, P₂: scott_open_set A
r₁: P₁ x₂
r₂: P₂ a
r₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
(P₁ x₂ × unit)%type

r₁: P₁ x₂
r₂: P₂ a
r₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
∏ x : pr1 A × pr1 B,
¬ ((P₁ (pr1 x) × unit) × P₂ (pr1 x) × unit)%type

A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂

P₁, P₂: scott_open_set A
r₁: P₁ x₂
r₂: P₂ a
r₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
x₃: pr1 A
y₃: pr1 B
s₁: P₁ x₃
s₂: P₂ x₃
∅

        exact (r₃ _ (s₁ ,, s₂)).
    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₁: is_hausdorff_separated x₂ a
H₂: is_hausdorff_separated y₂ b
x₁,, y₁ ≪ a,, b
∨ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

is_hausdorff_separated x₂ a
→ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

      
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B

Hb: is_strongly_maximal b

y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₂: is_hausdorff_separated y₂ b
(∑ P₁ P₂ : scott_open_set A,
 P₁ x₂ ∧ P₂ a ∧ are_disjoint P₁ P₂)
→ is_hausdorff_separated (x₂,, y₂) (a,, b)

P₁ (x₂,, y₂) ∧ P₂ (a,, b) ∧ are_disjoint P₁ P₂

A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₂: is_hausdorff_separated y₂ b

r₁: P₁ x₂
r₂: P₂ a
r₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
x₃: pr1 A
y₃: pr1 B
¬ ((P₁ (pr1 (x₃,, y₃)) × unit)
   × P₂ (pr1 (x₃,, y₃)) × unit)%type

        
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
Ha: is_strongly_maximal a
Hb: is_strongly_maximal b
x₁: pr1 A
y₁: pr1 B
x₂: pr1 A
y₂: pr1 B
q: x₁,, y₁ ≪ x₂,, y₂
p₁:= way_below_prod_pr1 basis_B q : x₁ ≪ x₂: x₁ ≪ x₂
p₂:= way_below_prod_pr2 basis_A q : y₁ ≪ y₂: y₁ ≪ y₂
H₂: is_hausdorff_separated y₂ b
P₁, P₂: scott_open_set A
r₁: P₁ x₂
r₂: P₂ a
r₃: are_disjoint P₁ P₂
x₃: pr1 A
y₃: pr1 B
s₁: P₁ x₃
s₂: P₂ x₃
∅

        exact (r₃ _ (s₁ ,, s₂)).
  Qed.

  
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
≃ (is_strongly_maximal a ∧ is_strongly_maximal b)

  
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
≃ (is_strongly_maximal a ∧ is_strongly_maximal b)

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
→ is_strongly_maximal a ∧ is_strongly_maximal b
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
is_strongly_maximal a ∧ is_strongly_maximal b
→ is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)

    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
→ is_strongly_maximal a ∧ is_strongly_maximal b
 exact (λ p, strongly_maximal_pr1 p ,, strongly_maximal_pr2 p).
    
A, B: dcpo
CA: continuous_dcpo_struct A
CB: continuous_dcpo_struct B
basis_A:= basis_from_continuous_struct CA: dcpo_basis A
basis_B:= basis_from_continuous_struct CB: dcpo_basis B
a: A
b: B
is_strongly_maximal a ∧ is_strongly_maximal b
→ is_strongly_maximal (a,, b)
 exact (λ p, strongly_maximal_pair (pr1 p) (pr2 p)).
  Defined.
End StronglyMaximal.
